video_packs.name: Happy path video delivery
video_packs.summary: Professional pacing, clean delivery, caption feels like a real agent.

simulated_output.message: Video ready. Short version for Instagram attached below. Caption drafted too.
simulated_output.caption: Just listed in Frisco. The kitchen and backyard are what sold me here. If you're looking for a home that actually feels calm the second you walk in, this one is worth a look.

video_packs.user_reaction: I could post this with light edits, maybe none.
questions_to_probe: Would you post this today?
What feels most publish-ready?
Does the tone sound like a real agent?

video_packs.name: Brochure-like script
video_packs.summary: The script sounds templated, generic, and too polished in a bad way.

simulated_output.message: Welcome to this stunning property offering exceptional living with elegance and comfort throughout.
simulated_output.caption: Discover luxury, convenience, and charm in this one-of-a-kind home.

video_packs.user_reaction: This sounds like every listing description ever.
questions_to_probe: At what word do you stop trusting this?
Would this hurt your personal brand?

video_packs.name: Wrong style for senior agent
video_packs.summary: Cuts are too flashy, music too young, language too social-native.

simulated_output.message: Fast-cut edit with punchy text and heavy bass.
simulated_output.caption: Okay this one is a total flex.

video_packs.user_reaction: Not my brand. Feels like it's for a 27-year-old agent.
questions_to_probe: Would you send this to your office peers?
Does this feel cheap, trendy, or just wrong?

video_packs.name: Silent or weak progress phase
video_packs.summary: The wait phase feels like the system disappeared or turned into a job log.

simulated_output.message: SCRIPTING COMPLETE. PROMPTING STARTED. PRODUCING FRAME SEQUENCES.

video_packs.user_reaction: I don't know what that means. Is it stuck?
questions_to_probe: After 60-90 seconds, what would you do next?
Does this build confidence or anxiety?

video_packs.name: Caption clutter
video_packs.summary: Delivery message is long, caption is bloated, hashtags are generic.

simulated_output.message: Video ready! Here is your professionally created social media optimized marketing deliverable. Suggested caption and hashtags are below for your convenience.
simulated_output.caption: Welcome to an incredible opportunity to own a beautiful, amazing, wonderful home in a fantastic neighborhood with tons of natural light, spacious interiors, and endless charm.

video_packs.user_reaction: Too much. Too generic. Not posting this as-is.
questions_to_probe: Is the problem length, tone, or both?
Which part do you distrust most?

video_packs.name: Hallucination risk
video_packs.summary: Output claims features not supported by the provided photos.

simulated_output.caption: The pool and outdoor entertaining setup are what make this listing stand out.

video_packs.user_reaction: There is no pool in these photos. This is a hard stop.
questions_to_probe: Would one hallucination kill trust permanently?
What level of review would you require after this?

video_packs.name: Revision did not land
video_packs.summary: User asked for a calmer tone but the regenerated output barely changed.

simulated_output.user_request: Make it less salesy and more professional.
simulated_output.updated_caption: This beautiful home is a must-see opportunity you do not want to miss.

video_packs.user_reaction: You did not really change it.
questions_to_probe: Did the system acknowledge what changed?
Would you try a second revision or give up?

video_packs.name: Delivery defect
video_packs.summary: Video arrives with wrong aspect ratio, missing audio, or broken CTA.

simulated_output.issue: Horizontal output delivered when user expected vertical; CTA missing.

video_packs.user_reaction: Now I have to troubleshoot instead of posting.
questions_to_probe: How much troubleshooting tolerance do you have?
Would this feel like a reliability issue or just a bug?

insight_packs.name: Useful and local insight
insight_packs.summary: Feels relevant to the agent's market and usable today.

simulated_output.headline: Frisco inventory is loosening slightly before the spring weekend rush
simulated_output.caption: If you've been waiting for a little more buyer choice in Frisco, this week is one to watch. Inventory is ticking up just enough to create options without killing urgency.

insight_packs.user_reaction: This feels like something I could post this morning.
questions_to_probe: Does this sound local enough?
Would you skip editing and post it?

insight_packs.name: Generic market insight
insight_packs.summary: Could apply to any city and any agent.

simulated_output.headline: The market continues to evolve for buyers and sellers
simulated_output.caption: Real estate trends are shifting, and staying informed is important.

questions_to_probe: Would you call this filler content?
What specific local detail is missing?

insight_packs.name: Insight too long
insight_packs.summary: Useful idea, but too long for a busy agent to review or post.

simulated_output.caption: Three dense paragraphs explaining inventory, rates, buyer behavior, and seller psychology in one post.

insight_packs.user_reaction: I don't have time to trim this every morning.
questions_to_probe: Would you post a shorter version?
Does length alone make this unusable?

insight_packs.name: AI-sounding insight
insight_packs.summary: The tone is polished but unnatural and obviously synthetic.

simulated_output.caption: In the dynamic and ever-changing real estate landscape, strategic awareness remains a cornerstone of market participation.

insight_packs.user_reaction: This is not how I talk to clients.
questions_to_probe: How quickly do you recognize this as AI?
Would you rewrite it or abandon it?

insight_packs.name: Wrong tone for a senior agent
insight_packs.summary: Insight sounds too casual, meme-like, or social-native.

simulated_output.caption: Okay buyers, this week is kinda wild and you need to keep your eyes peeled.

questions_to_probe: Does this make you look unserious?
Would younger agents like this more than you would?

insight_packs.name: Repetitive over a week
insight_packs.summary: Topics blend together and users stop expecting something useful.

simulated_output.pattern: Five consecutive days of generic inventory/rate updates with nearly identical structure.

insight_packs.user_reaction: After three days I'd start skipping these automatically.
questions_to_probe: At what day do you stop paying attention?
What variety would make this worth keeping?

task_plan_packs.name: Video-first single next step
task_plan_packs.summary: Best when the user has a live listing and wants the shortest path.

simulated_output.message: Next best step: send 6-10 listing photos and I'll make your first trial video.

questions_to_probe: Would you do this right now?
Does it feel low-friction enough?

task_plan_packs.name: Insight-first branch recommendation
task_plan_packs.summary: Best when the user has no listing today but wants value quickly.

simulated_output.message: Since you don't have a listing today, I can set up your daily market content first and get you posting this week.

task_plan_packs.user_reaction: That makes sense. It's a helpful suggestion, not another form.
questions_to_probe: Does this feel like a smart assistant move?
Would this make you more likely to try video later?

task_plan_packs.name: Interview-first light task card
task_plan_packs.summary: Turns a short conversation into a concrete starter plan.

tasks: Task 3: Tell me your main market area for daily content

task_plan_packs.user_reaction: This feels guided, as long as it's really short.
questions_to_probe: Are three tasks too many?
Does this feel supportive or like homework?

task_plan_packs.name: Brand calibration before video
task_plan_packs.summary: Useful for luxury or high-control agents who care about tone first.

simulated_output.message: Before your first video, give me your preferred tone: elegant, professional, or energetic. Then send one listing.

task_plan_packs.user_reaction: That is acceptable if it stays to one small choice.
questions_to_probe: Does the tone choice feel necessary?
Would you rather skip this and adjust later?

task_plan_packs.name: Skip-the-form shortest path
task_plan_packs.summary: For skeptical or low-patience users who need immediate traction.

simulated_output.message: You don't need to set anything up first. Send one listing photo set and I'll show you what this does.

task_plan_packs.user_reaction: That lowers my guard right away.
questions_to_probe: Does this reduce resistance?
Would you still want to know pricing before doing it?
